emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements Charles, I think that we are better off just conveying the clean LSE over to NETCO and then registering as an REP in the event we need to. The QSE needs to be re done as the last one is messy. Thanks, Doug

emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: Thats what I understand from a converstion with Smith yesterday.

emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: A question, am I correct that the LSE status being referred to is NOT EPMI if so, is it with EES? or what entity?

emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements It is with epmi as I believe that is the one smith set up. It is not an ees one. Doug Doug-Gilbert Smith
